editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.

rollup.summary: Move X connect UI from sidebar into feed blank state

Add per-feed context menu with sync status, rename, and unsubscribe
Sync button opens status popover instead of immediate refresh
fixes: Rename sidebar-scroll to minimal-scroll, apply to feed content area
Hide logo in desktop mobile-layout to clear macOS traffic lights
Add top padding to first card in feed list
performance: Lazy-load images, drop backdrop-filter blur, add scroll gutter
